capabilities.capability: Sixteen source-backed prompt artifacts generated from tracked Markdown
capabilities.evidence: Generated items include source paths, source text, and a source fingerprint.
capabilities.gate: npm run catalog:evaluate && npm run schema:validate
capabilities.user_impact: Users can trace each active catalog item to a tracked source file.
capabilities.next_action: Add behavior datasets before promoting any item beyond draft maturity.

capabilities.capability: Historical 159-record, 31-domain console catalog
capabilities.evidence: intake/legacy-console-v1/catalog.json preserves all 159 original records; 38 have empty summaries, 47 empty input lists, 50 empty rules, and 50 are marked non-enforceable.
capabilities.user_impact: Historical breadth remains discoverable without being misrepresented as approved content.
capabilities.next_action: Rank by domain value, repair source metadata, add behavioral cases, and promote one bounded cohort at a time.

capabilities.capability: Prompt, workflow, playbook, and runbook type system
capabilities.evidence: The schema supports four types, but the active generated catalog contains prompts only.
capabilities.user_impact: The catalog can represent more than prompts but does not yet deliver those artifact classes.
capabilities.next_action: Define source metadata and ship one tested workflow, playbook, and runbook before adding type filters to the UI.

capabilities.capability: Deterministic prompt structure lint
capabilities.evidence: Six deterministic factors are reproducible in Node and the browser; adversarial fixtures document false positives.
capabilities.user_impact: Users receive fast formatting and contract-completeness feedback, not an effectiveness claim.
capabilities.next_action: Keep this as a cheap first gate and never use it as release authority.

capabilities.capability: Versioned inputs, expected outcomes, rubrics, and oracles
capabilities.evidence: Two synthetic failure records and three echo-provider cases do not exercise model outputs or task outcomes.
capabilities.user_impact: Prompt effectiveness and correctness are currently unknown.
capabilities.next_action: Create versioned domain datasets starting with decision-matrix and repository-delivery outcomes.

capabilities.capability: Multi-provider and multi-model execution matrix
capabilities.evidence: The current promptfoo configuration uses only a local echo provider.
capabilities.user_impact: Cross-model quality, portability, latency, and cost are not measured.
capabilities.next_action: Add credential-gated provider profiles with fixed datasets, budgets, and stored receipts outside the default offline gate.

capabilities.capability: Immutable accepted experiment baselines and candidate diffs
capabilities.evidence: No accepted baseline ID, candidate comparison, metric budget, or regression decision is persisted.
capabilities.user_impact: Users cannot tell whether an edit improved or regressed real behavior.
capabilities.next_action: Add immutable experiment receipts and per-metric regression budgets before automatic prompt promotion.

capabilities.capability: Randomized blind pairwise comparison
capabilities.evidence: No pairwise evaluator, order randomization, or side-by-side output comparison exists.
capabilities.user_impact: Subjective improvements cannot be compared without position and anchoring bias.
capabilities.next_action: Implement pairwise experiment records and randomized display after behavioral datasets exist.

capabilities.capability: Adversarial prompt and agent red-team suites
capabilities.source: promptfoo and Inspect AI integration plan
capabilities.evidence: Prompt text names adversarial cases, but no model target is attacked and no safety result is recorded.
capabilities.gate: No promptfoo redteam or Inspect task passes in CI.
capabilities.user_impact: Jailbreak, injection, leakage, tool misuse, and over-blocking risks are unmeasured.
capabilities.next_action: Add bounded red-team targets, negative controls, and separate safety vetoes.

capabilities.capability: Rubric-based human annotation and disagreement capture
capabilities.evidence: No annotation queue, reviewer identity, pairwise vote, or adjudication record exists.
capabilities.user_impact: Subjective quality dimensions have no calibrated human authority.
capabilities.next_action: Add local annotation records and export before any model judge is treated as calibrated.

capabilities.capability: Production trace evaluation and failure promotion
capabilities.evidence: A deterministic promotion path exists, but no production traces or user feedback are captured automatically.
capabilities.user_impact: Manual failures can become regressions, but real-world misses are not yet observable at scale.
capabilities.next_action: Define a privacy-bounded failure envelope and explicit import from owning applications.

capabilities.capability: Token, cost, latency, error, and work-limit budgets
capabilities.evidence: The current echo smoke records no provider cost or latency distribution and enforces no per-run budget.
capabilities.user_impact: A quality gain could silently make the product too slow or expensive.
capabilities.next_action: Add run limits and release budgets to provider-backed experiments.

capabilities.capability: Offline single-file catalog, evaluator, and source registry
capabilities.evidence: Generated data, scoring runtime, source fingerprint, and Playwright workflows pass locally.
capabilities.gate: npm run test:console && npm run catalog:evaluate
capabilities.user_impact: Users can browse active prompts and run structural lint without a network service.
capabilities.next_action: Expose capability and experiment truth without expanding the browser's authority.

capabilities.capability: Paste, drop, open-file, directory read, and explicit receipt save
capabilities.evidence: Playwright covers fallback workflows; browser directory permissions can expire and are not filesystem-watch authority.
capabilities.user_impact: Local evaluation works, but persistent live indexing is browser- and permission-dependent.
capabilities.next_action: Move durable watch and workspace permissions into the scoped desktop shell.

capabilities.capability: Distinguish embedded source state from current local and remote repository state
capabilities.evidence: The embedded fingerprint proves source consistency at build time, not equality with the latest remote commit at runtime.
capabilities.user_impact: The console can prove what it contains but cannot independently prove it is the latest published state.
capabilities.next_action: Add a desktop/CLI source-state adapter that reports local HEAD, upstream HEAD, dirty state, and fingerprint separately.

capabilities.capability: Shared Windows and macOS desktop shell
capabilities.evidence: ADR-0001 selects Electron for desktop v1 after inventorying current main and the unmerged Node Prompt Engine; no target-host build exists.
capabilities.user_impact: PromptOS is not currently an installed desktop product.
capabilities.next_action: Repair and accept the Node Prompt Engine, extract framework-neutral TypeScript Core and React workbench packages, then build the bounded Electron proof without coupling Core packages to the shell.

capabilities.capability: Signed Windows installer, upgrade, updater, uninstall, and recovery
capabilities.evidence: No Windows package, signature, clean-host installation, or updater test exists.
capabilities.gate: No Windows release gate has passed.
capabilities.user_impact: Windows users must open the browser console manually.
capabilities.next_action: Prove install and lifecycle behavior on a clean Windows host after the shell spike.

capabilities.capability: Signed and notarized macOS application with Gatekeeper and updater proof
capabilities.evidence: No macOS bundle, hardened runtime, entitlements, notarization, stapling, Gatekeeper, or update test exists.
capabilities.gate: No macOS release gate has passed.
capabilities.user_impact: macOS users do not have an installed PromptOS application.
capabilities.next_action: Run the release proof on a Mac after Windows establishes the shared shell contract.

capabilities.capability: Hash-backed local evaluation receipts
capabilities.evidence: Receipts preserve source hash and structural factors, but do not yet identify datasets, models, graders, or accepted baselines.
capabilities.gate: npm run benchmark:evaluator && npm run test:console
capabilities.user_impact: Users can audit lint results but not full behavioral experiments.
capabilities.next_action: Version the receipt schema for behavioral runs without breaking structural receipts.

capabilities.capability: Machine-validated capability inventory and disposition
capabilities.evidence: Every recorded capability requires status, source, evidence, gate, impact, next action, and replacement state.
capabilities.user_impact: Removed or unfinished work remains visible instead of disappearing from the product story.
capabilities.next_action: Require ledger updates whenever a capability is added, removed, superseded, or retired.

capabilities.capability: Unmerged prompt-engine orchestration, provider, benchmark, service, and operations console branch
capabilities.evidence: The branch contains prompt-engine source, fixtures, tests, CLI, server, and UI but has not passed current main contracts or product-boundary review.
capabilities.gate: No current-main integration gate has passed.
capabilities.user_impact: Potentially valuable engine features are preserved but unavailable in the canonical console.
capabilities.next_action: Audit modules against Core contracts and import only behavior proven by current datasets and gates.

capabilities.capability: Content from closed PRs 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 10, and 20
capabilities.owner: PromptOS intake and dev-setup by artifact type
capabilities.source: GitHub PR history and preserved remote branches
capabilities.evidence: Branches remain available after PR closure and issue #22 tracks salvage.
capabilities.gate: No artifact is promoted without PromptOS or dev-setup owner-specific gates.
capabilities.user_impact: Closing obsolete integration paths does not discard unique prompt or workflow content.
capabilities.next_action: Create artifact-level dispositions rather than merging whole legacy branches.

capabilities.capability: OperatorOS Agentic Playbook package
capabilities.evidence: Archive integrity and synthetic selftests pass, but ownership, schema validation, installer behavior, and production claims conflict with live systems.
capabilities.gate: Do not install; salvage only owner-scoped artifacts after adversarial review.
capabilities.user_impact: Useful concepts remain available without allowing the package to overwrite canonical platform files.
capabilities.next_action: Compare individual prompts and schemas against the ledger and reject duplicate doctrine.

capabilities.capability: Rate-aware isolated AI repair branches for failed CI
capabilities.evidence: Draft workflows and policy code are isolated and untested; a prior DSM-Jobs canary entered review mode and opened no repair PR.
capabilities.gate: No live repair-to-PR canary has passed.
capabilities.user_impact: Failed runs are not yet reliably repaired without operator intervention.
capabilities.next_action: Resume only after PromptOS release criteria are explicit; prove bounded branch creation, repair, independent gates, and PR creation in a canary repo.

capabilities.capability: Canary deployment, health verification, automatic rollback, and critical-only alerting
capabilities.evidence: No shared deployment adapter contract or live repair-deploy-rollback proof exists for PromptOS.
capabilities.gate: No live deployment gate has passed.
capabilities.user_impact: The system cannot safely hot-load repairs or prove recovery after a bad deployment.
capabilities.next_action: Define provider-specific health and rollback adapters; alert only on security threats or exhausted recovery.

capabilities.capability: Stale Desktop PromptOS console copy
capabilities.evidence: The file matched a historical Git object byte-for-byte and no shortcut targeted it before removal.
capabilities.gate: Retirement recorded in PR #23 and canonical main passed npm run verify.
capabilities.user_impact: Users no longer risk opening a stale duplicate console.
capabilities.next_action: Keep one canonical checkout and expose source freshness in-product.
